next_steps: Perform orbital biopsy of the inflamed tissue
Evaluate for systemic IgG4-related disease involving other organs
Perform serum IgG4 subclass testing and ANA/ENA/anti-dsDNA panel
Consult rheumatology and ophthalmology for multidisciplinary management
Consider rituximab therapy if IgG4-RD is confirmed and steroid-refractory
